description: An excellent combination of superior technology and style,, the Expo from lotto will keep your feet dry and comfortable all day. Slip into these shoes during your training sessions or chill in them while out with your friends.Upper Synthetic upper for extended durability Synthetic lace-up system for durability and snug Fit Cushioned collar and padded tongue for extremely comfortable grip on the foot Stitched overlays on the sides to further add to the structure Midsole EVA injected midsole for lightweight feel and superior shock absorption Padded sockliner for snug fit and comfort grip Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with zigzag pattern for enhanced grip on any terrain Extended rubber outsole embedded onto the toe box for superior shock absorption Textured outsole extended till the midfoot region shoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
